title: Create
contentPostSubtitle: Share a photo, video, or quick food moment.
reviewSubtitle: Rate the restaurant and the dishes you tried.
cameraPermissionBody: Allow camera access to capture a quick post, or choose a photo from your gallery.
emptyContentBody: Food moments from people you follow will appear here. You can start the feed with your own.
contentEmptyHint: Capture a photo, tag the place, and post.
emptyReviewsBody: Detailed restaurant and dish reviews from the community will appear here.
reviewEmptyHint: Share where you ate and what you thought.
finishQuickPostBody: Tag the place, add a note if you want, then preview it.
addDescriptionBody: This is optional. You can keep it short or leave it empty.
chooseRestaurantBody: Every quick post must be connected to a place.
searchRestaurantPrompt: Search for the restaurant in your photo.
noRestaurantsFound: No restaurants found. Try another search.
visibilityPUBLICHint: Everyone can see it. Public reviews affect restaurant and dish ratings.
visibilityFRIENDSHint: Only people you follow who also follow you can see it. It will not affect public ratings.
visibilityPRIVATEHint: This stays in your private food diary and will not affect public ratings.
nearbyUnavailable: Allow location access to see the nearest places, or search by name.
noNearbyPlaces: No nearby places were found. Try searching by name.
